title: Where to File Appeal. Appeals from the Orders/Decisions of the Regional
content: 56 Director, Undersecretary for Licensing and Adjudication Services, or the former POEA 57 Administrator shall be filed with the Office of the Legal Service or the Regional Office 58 concerned. 59 60 52
